channel.title: Workshop on Anna Stein
channel.description: Recent content in Workshop on Anna Stein

item.title: Libre SLAM
item.description: “#FOSS4ALL” is a one day workshop that provides the researcher of any discipline with an understanding of Free/Open Source beyond the technical realm, as a model of research development. After the workshop the results will be achrived and featured on (the SLaM lab website)[https://slam.phil.hhu.de/libreslam].
